description: PHR feature visibility configuration - controls which features are discoverable and accessible in different environments

development.description: Local development environment - all features visible

staging.description: Staging environment - feature-flagged features visible for testing

production.description: Production environment - only production-ready features visible

provider-dashboard.name: Provider Dashboard
provider-dashboard.description: Clinical provider dashboard for patient management
provider-dashboard.notes: Backend implementation incomplete. Feature-flagged until production-ready.

caregiver-dependents.name: Caregiver Dependents
caregiver-dependents.description: Caregiver delegated access to dependent patient records
caregiver-dependents.notes: Placeholder/minimal page exists. Full implementation deferred.

fchv-workflows.name: FCHV Workflows
fchv-workflows.description: Female Community Health Volunteer workflows for community health
fchv-workflows.notes: Feature-flagged. May be deferred from MVP depending on Nepal healthcare priorities.

emergency-break-glass.name: Emergency Break-Glass
emergency-break-glass.description: Emergency access override for critical situations
emergency-break-glass.notes: Implemented with audit trail and policy gate.

release-readiness.name: Release Readiness
release-readiness.description: Admin release readiness dashboard and evidence
release-readiness.notes: Currently parses evidence files directly. Should migrate to Kernel runtime API.

audit-trail.name: Audit Trail
audit-trail.description: Comprehensive audit event logging and review
audit-trail.notes: Implemented with pagination, detail views, and export.

patient-dashboard.name: Patient Dashboard
patient-dashboard.description: Main patient dashboard with health summary
patient-dashboard.notes: Web and mobile both serve dashboard data. Mobile uses encrypted offline cache.

patient-records.name: Patient Records
patient-records.notes: Implemented with filters, detail view, and FHIR viewer.

patient-consent.name: Patient Consent Management
patient-consent.notes: Implemented with grant creation, revocation, and listing.

patient-appointments.name: Patient Appointments
patient-appointments.notes: Request workflow exists, full booking workflow needs implementation.

patient-documents.name: Patient Documents
patient-documents.notes: Implemented with upload, OCR review, and secure download.

patient-notifications.name: Patient Notifications
patient-notifications.notes: Implemented with read/unread state and action tracking.

patient.name: Patient Features
patient.description: Features for patient users to manage their health records

provider.name: Provider Features
provider.description: Features for clinical providers to manage patient care

caregiver.name: Caregiver Features
caregiver.description: Features for caregivers with delegated access

fchv.name: FCHV Features
fchv.description: Features for Female Community Health Volunteers
